name: obsidian-google-calendar-notes
description: Obsidian plugin for Google Calendar note integration

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json package.json
scripts.version:patch: node version-bump.mjs patch && git add manifest.json versions.json package.json
scripts.version:minor: node version-bump.mjs minor && git add manifest.json versions.json package.json
scripts.version:major: node version-bump.mjs major && git add manifest.json versions.json package.json

author: Brian Pavane
